evals.expected_output: Resolves 'last-month' to the prior calendar month; reads matching archive files and live Done sections; produces wiki/team-status/accomplishments-YYYY-MM.md with Synopsis, Highlights (high-priority tasks), By Project breakdown, Volume Summary table, and Themes.

evals.prompt: What did we accomplish in Q2?
evals.expected_output: Resolves Q2 to the Apr–Jun date range; reads archive/tasks-2026-04.md through tasks-2026-06.md for all projects; supplements with live Done sections for unarchived tasks in range; produces a quarterly accomplishments report at wiki/team-status/accomplishments-2026-Q2.md.

evals.prompt: Generate an accomplishments report for order-platform — April only, for leadership.
evals.expected_output: Scopes to order-platform; reads archive/tasks-2026-04.md; produces wiki/projects/order-platform/delivery/accomplishments-2026-04.md in leadership mode: Synopsis + top-3 Highlights + Volume Summary only, no By Project detail.
